config.content:
## 🤖 Agent Builder — Overview
Real-time observability for **Agent Builder** OTel traces (`data_stream.dataset: agent_builder.otel`). Monitor LLM token usage & cost, conversation throughput, agent execution, tool call health, and workflow performance — all in one place.

data_source.query:
FROM traces-agent_builder.otel-default
| WHERE @timestamp >= ?_tstart AND @timestamp < ?_tend AND data_stream.dataset == "agent_builder.otel"
| WHERE name == "ChatComplete"
| STATS `Total Input Tokens` = SUM(TO_LONG(attributes.gen_ai.usage.input_tokens))

FROM traces-agent_builder.otel-default
| WHERE @timestamp >= ?_tstart AND @timestamp < ?_tend AND data_stream.dataset == "agent_builder.otel"
| WHERE name == "ChatComplete"
| STATS `Total Output Tokens` = SUM(TO_LONG(attributes.gen_ai.usage.output_tokens))

FROM traces-agent_builder.otel-default
| WHERE @timestamp >= ?_tstart AND @timestamp < ?_tend AND data_stream.dataset == "agent_builder.otel"
| WHERE name == "ChatComplete"
| STATS `LLM Requests` = COUNT(*)

config.title: Total Token Usage Over Time by Model

data_source.query:
FROM traces-agent_builder.otel-default
| WHERE @timestamp >= ?_tstart AND @timestamp < ?_tend AND data_stream.dataset == "agent_builder.otel"
| WHERE name == "ChatComplete"
| STATS `Total Tokens` = SUM(TO_LONG(attributes.gen_ai.usage.input_tokens)) + SUM(TO_LONG(attributes.gen_ai.usage.output_tokens)) BY `Time` = BUCKET(@timestamp, 75, ?_tstart, ?_tend), `Model` = attributes.gen_ai.request.model

FROM traces-agent_builder.otel-default
| WHERE @timestamp >= ?_tstart AND @timestamp < ?_tend AND data_stream.dataset == "agent_builder.otel"
| WHERE name == "ChatComplete"
| STATS `Request Count` = COUNT(*) BY `Model` = attributes.gen_ai.request.model
| SORT `Request Count` DESC

config.title: ChatComplete Request Count by LLM Provider

data_source.query:
FROM traces-agent_builder.otel-default
| WHERE @timestamp >= ?_tstart AND @timestamp < ?_tend AND data_stream.dataset == "agent_builder.otel"
| WHERE name == "ChatComplete"
| STATS `Request Count` = COUNT(*) BY `Provider` = attributes.gen_ai.system
| SORT `Request Count` DESC

FROM traces-agent_builder.otel-default
| WHERE @timestamp >= ?_tstart AND @timestamp < ?_tend AND data_stream.dataset == "agent_builder.otel"
| WHERE name == "Converse"
| STATS `Conversations` = COUNT(*)

FROM traces-agent_builder.otel-default
| WHERE @timestamp >= ?_tstart AND @timestamp < ?_tend AND data_stream.dataset == "agent_builder.otel"
| WHERE name == "Converse"
| EVAL duration_sec = duration / 1000000000.0
| STATS `Avg Duration (s)` = ROUND(AVG(duration_sec), 2)

FROM traces-agent_builder.otel-default
| WHERE @timestamp >= ?_tstart AND @timestamp < ?_tend AND data_stream.dataset == "agent_builder.otel"
| WHERE name == "Converse"
| EVAL duration_sec = duration / 1000000000.0
| STATS `P95 Duration (s)` = ROUND(PERCENTILE(duration_sec, 95), 2)

FROM traces-agent_builder.otel-default
| WHERE @timestamp >= ?_tstart AND @timestamp < ?_tend AND data_stream.dataset == "agent_builder.otel"
| WHERE name == "Converse"
| EVAL duration_sec = duration / 1000000000.0
| STATS `Max Duration (s)` = ROUND(MAX(duration_sec), 2)

FROM traces-agent_builder.otel-default
| WHERE @timestamp >= ?_tstart AND @timestamp < ?_tend AND data_stream.dataset == "agent_builder.otel"
| WHERE name == "Converse"
| STATS `Conversations` = COUNT(*) BY `Time` = BUCKET(@timestamp, 75, ?_tstart, ?_tend)
| SORT `Time`

FROM traces-agent_builder.otel-default
| WHERE @timestamp >= ?_tstart AND @timestamp < ?_tend AND data_stream.dataset == "agent_builder.otel"
| WHERE name == "Converse"
| EVAL duration_sec = duration / 1000000000.0
| STATS `Avg Duration (s)` = ROUND(AVG(duration_sec), 2) BY `Time` = BUCKET(@timestamp, 75, ?_tstart, ?_tend)
| SORT `Time`

FROM traces-agent_builder.otel-default
| WHERE @timestamp >= ?_tstart AND @timestamp < ?_tend AND data_stream.dataset == "agent_builder.otel"
| WHERE name == "ExecuteAgent"
| STATS `Agent Executions` = COUNT(*)

FROM traces-agent_builder.otel-default
| WHERE @timestamp >= ?_tstart AND @timestamp < ?_tend AND data_stream.dataset == "agent_builder.otel"
| WHERE name == "ExecuteAgent"
| EVAL duration_sec = duration / 1000000000.0
| STATS `Avg Duration (s)` = ROUND(AVG(duration_sec), 2)

FROM traces-agent_builder.otel-default
| WHERE @timestamp >= ?_tstart AND @timestamp < ?_tend AND data_stream.dataset == "agent_builder.otel"
| WHERE name == "ExecuteAgent"
| EVAL duration_sec = duration / 1000000000.0
| STATS `P95 Duration (s)` = ROUND(PERCENTILE(duration_sec, 95), 2)

FROM traces-agent_builder.otel-default
| WHERE @timestamp >= ?_tstart AND @timestamp < ?_tend AND data_stream.dataset == "agent_builder.otel"
| WHERE name == "ExecuteAgent"
| EVAL duration_sec = duration / 1000000000.0
| STATS `Max Duration (s)` = ROUND(MAX(duration_sec), 2)

config.title: ExecuteAgent Avg Duration (s) by Agent Over Time

data_source.query:
FROM traces-agent_builder.otel-default
| WHERE @timestamp >= ?_tstart AND @timestamp < ?_tend AND data_stream.dataset == "agent_builder.otel"
| WHERE name == "ExecuteAgent"
| EVAL duration_sec = duration / 1000000000.0
| STATS `Avg Duration (s)` = ROUND(AVG(duration_sec), 2) BY `Time` = BUCKET(@timestamp, 75, ?_tstart, ?_tend), `Agent` = attributes.elastic.agent.id
| SORT `Time`

config.title: ExecuteAgent Execution Count by Agent Over Time

data_source.query:
FROM traces-agent_builder.otel-default
| WHERE @timestamp >= ?_tstart AND @timestamp < ?_tend AND data_stream.dataset == "agent_builder.otel"
| WHERE name == "ExecuteAgent"
| STATS `Execution Count` = COUNT(*) BY `Time` = BUCKET(@timestamp, 75, ?_tstart, ?_tend), `Agent` = attributes.elastic.agent.id
| SORT `Time`

FROM traces-agent_builder.otel-default
| WHERE @timestamp >= ?_tstart AND @timestamp < ?_tend AND data_stream.dataset == "agent_builder.otel"
| WHERE STARTS_WITH(name, "Tool:")
| STATS `Tool Calls` = COUNT(*)

FROM traces-agent_builder.otel-default
| WHERE @timestamp >= ?_tstart AND @timestamp < ?_tend AND data_stream.dataset == "agent_builder.otel"
| WHERE STARTS_WITH(name, "Tool:") AND status.code == "Error"
| STATS `Tool Errors` = COUNT(*)

FROM traces-agent_builder.otel-default
| WHERE @timestamp >= ?_tstart AND @timestamp < ?_tend AND data_stream.dataset == "agent_builder.otel"
| WHERE STARTS_WITH(name, "Tool:")
| STATS total = COUNT(*), errors = COUNT(*) WHERE status.code == "Error"
| EVAL `Success Rate (%)` = ROUND((total - errors) / total * 100, 2)
| KEEP `Success Rate (%)`

FROM traces-agent_builder.otel-default
| WHERE @timestamp >= ?_tstart AND @timestamp < ?_tend AND data_stream.dataset == "agent_builder.otel"
| WHERE STARTS_WITH(name, "Tool:")
| EVAL duration_sec = duration / 1000000000.0
| STATS `Avg Duration (s)` = ROUND(AVG(duration_sec), 2)

config.title: Tool Invocations by Tool Name Over Time

data_source.query:
FROM traces-agent_builder.otel-default
| WHERE @timestamp >= ?_tstart AND @timestamp < ?_tend AND data_stream.dataset == "agent_builder.otel"
| WHERE STARTS_WITH(name, "Tool:")
| STATS `Tool Count` = COUNT(*) BY `Time` = BUCKET(@timestamp, 75, ?_tstart, ?_tend), `Tool Name` = name
| SORT `Time`

config.title: Tool Count by Status Over Time

data_source.query:
FROM traces-agent_builder.otel-default
| WHERE @timestamp >= ?_tstart AND @timestamp < ?_tend AND data_stream.dataset == "agent_builder.otel"
| WHERE STARTS_WITH(name, "Tool:")
| STATS `Tool Count` = COUNT(*) BY `Time` = BUCKET(@timestamp, 75, ?_tstart, ?_tend), `Status` = status.code
| SORT `Time`

FROM traces-agent_builder.otel-default
| WHERE @timestamp >= ?_tstart AND @timestamp < ?_tend AND data_stream.dataset == "agent_builder.otel"
| WHERE STARTS_WITH(name, "Tool:")
| STATS `Tool Count` = COUNT(*) BY `Tool Name` = name
| SORT `Tool Count` DESC
| LIMIT 15

FROM traces-agent_builder.otel-default
| WHERE @timestamp >= ?_tstart AND @timestamp < ?_tend AND data_stream.dataset == "agent_builder.otel"
| WHERE STARTS_WITH(name, "Tool:")
| STATS `Call Count` = COUNT(*) BY `Tool Name` = name
| SORT `Call Count` DESC
| LIMIT 15
